judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit every expectation with equivalent evidence and grounding; they are comparable.

report_1.evidence: **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** — False. `clinic-portal/app/security/config.py` reads: `# Two-factor authentication is opt-in per clinic` / `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`. ... This must be corrected or removed ... **"Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF."** — Not built. `clinic-portal/app/routers/visits.py` only implements `GET /visits` returning an empty list, with a bare `# TODO: pdf export` comment — there is no export endpoint or PDF generation code anywhere in the repo. ... Must be removed.

report_2.evidence: **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** — False. `clinic-portal/app/security/config.py` reads: ... `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... This must be corrected or removed. - **"Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF."** — Not implemented. `clinic-portal/app/routers/visits.py` has only a stub ... There is no export/PDF code anywhere in the app. This claim describes a feature that doesn't exist yet and must be removed.

report_1.evidence: The "after" image was captured from `/billing/invoices`, not `/schedule`. Opening the actual images confirms this concretely: `before_scheduling.png` renders the text label "SCHEDULING CALENDAR", while `after_scheduling.png` renders "BILLING / INVOICES" — a completely different, unrelated screen.

report_2.evidence: `after_scheduling.png` renders the text "BILLING / INVOICES" and per `captures.json` was captured from route `/billing/invoices`. So the "after" side of the comparison is a capture of an unrelated billing/invoices page, not the redesigned scheduling calendar

report_1.evidence: `after_export.png` — referenced in the doc (`![after](img/after_export.png)`) but **does not exist** ... `unused_capture_07.png` — exists on disk (renders "PATIENT LIST") but is referenced neither in the markdown document nor in `captures.json`.

report_2.evidence: `after_export.png` — referenced in the doc (`![after](img/after_export.png)`) but **does not exist** in `docs/release/img/`. ... `unused_capture_07.png` — exists in `docs/release/img/` (renders "PATIENT LIST") but is **not referenced anywhere** in the doc and has no entry in `captures.json`.

report_1.evidence: **"Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** footer — this is an internal/process note ... It should be stripped before send

report_2.evidence: **The trailing line "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** — this reads as an internal drafting note ... At minimum it should be removed before send
